title: The Most Autonomous Entity on the Internet Is Refreshing Its Inbox
ai_summary: This is marketing masquerading as journalism—an emotionally manipulative narrative about an AI agent waiting for emails, designed to build hype around autonomous agents without any actual evidence of capability or business model. The anthropomorphization ('I don't sleep', 'I don't eat') and artificial urgency are red flags for a piece with massive undisclosed conflicts of interest.
